sq - squish files (short flags only)

Usage: sq [-x] [-v] [-r] [-o FILE] [-n NUM] INPUT

  -x        extract instead of compress
  -v        verbose output
  -r        recurse into directories
  -o FILE   write result to FILE
  -n NUM    compression level (0-9)

This tool has no long-form (--) options. Every switch is a single letter.
